2605.12384.title: Scalable Token-Level Hallucination Detection in Large Language Models
2605.12384.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities, but they still frequently produce hallucinations. These hallucinations are difficult to detect in reasoning-intensive tasks, where the content appears coherent but contains errors like logical flaws and unreliable intermediate results. While step-level analysis is commonly used to detect internal hallucinations, it suffers from limited granularity and poor scalability due to its reliance on step segmentation. To address these limitations, we propose TokenHD, a holistic pipeline for training token-level hallucination detectors. Specifically, TokenHD consists of a scalable data engine for synthesizing large-scale hallucination annotations along with a training recipe featuring an importance-weighted strategy for robust model training. To systematically assess the detection performance, we also provide a rigorous evaluation protocol. Through training within TokenHD, our detector operates directly on free-form text to identify hallucinations, eliminating the need for predefined step segmentation or additional text reformatting. Our experiments show that even a small detector (0.6B) achieves substantial performance gains after training, surpassing much larger reasoning models (e.g., QwQ-32B), and detection performance scales consistently with model size from 0.6B to 8B. Finally, we show that our detector can generalize well across diverse practical scenarios and explore strategies to further enhance its cross-domain generalization capability.
2605.12384.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）展現了卓越的能力，但它們仍然經常產生幻覺。<lb/>這些幻覺在推理密集的任務中難以檢測，因為內容看似連貫，但卻包含邏輯缺陷和不可靠的中間結果等錯誤。<lb/>雖然逐步分析通常用於檢測內部幻覺，但由於依賴於步驟分段，它的粒度有限且可擴展性差。<lb/>為了解決這些限制，我們提出了TokenHD，一個訓練字元級幻覺檢測器的整體流程。<lb/>具體而言，TokenHD包含一個可擴展的數據引擎，用於合成大規模的幻覺註解，以及一個訓練食譜，特別採用重要性加權策略以實現穩健的模型訓練。<lb/>為了系統地評估檢測性能，我們還提供了一個嚴謹的評估協議。<lb/>通過在TokenHD內進行訓練，我們的檢測器能直接對自由格式文本進行操作，以識別幻覺，無需預定義的步驟分段或額外的文本重新格式化。<lb/>我們的實驗顯示，即使是小型檢測器（0.6B）在訓練後也能實現顯著的性能提升，超越了更大的推理模型（例如，QwQ-32B），而且檢測性能隨著模型大小從0.6B到8B一致性地擴展。<lb/>最後，我們展示了我們的檢測器能在多樣的實際場景中良好地泛化，並探索進一步增強其跨領域泛化能力的策略。
2605.12384.author: Rui Min et.al.
2605.12384.authors: Rui Min, Tianyu Pang, Chao Du, Minhao Cheng, Yi R. Fung
